title: gentiana yunnanensis subsp. kialensis
intro: Gentiana yunnanensis subsp. kialensis, also known as Kialing gentian, is a plant species in the gentian family (Gentianaceae) and is a subspecies of the Yunnan gentian (Gentiana yunnanensis). This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of fever and cough. The health benefits of Gentiana yunnanensis subsp. kialensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Gentiana yunnanensis subsp. kialensis is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a dried root or stem.
